_meta.description: Dam profile for Canuhandleajandal — reused across all her progeny listings.

name: Canuhandleajandal
description: Canuhandleajandal (NZ) is a daughter of Jimmy Choux from Family 22 and has already established herself as a commercially attractive young broodmare. Her pedigree combines the toughness and scope of Jimmy Choux with the Mastercraftsman and Zabeel influences carried through Ouzo, giving her progeny a balanced mix of speed and stamina. She has already produced I Stole A Manolo (NZ) by Satono Aladdin, and her 2024 Super Seth filly sold for $260,000 at the 2026 National Yearling Sales to Wexford Stables.
breeding_record: Dam of multiple foals including I Stole A Manolo (NZ) 2023 by Satono Aladdin, a 2024 Super Seth filly ($260,000 yearling sale), and a 2025 Ardrossan colt.
